mapper.select:
select category_code, category_name as "title", id as "key", (case when is_has_child = 1 then 0 else 1 end) as isLeaf, parent_id as parentId from kol_category where parent_id = #{parentId}
and ${key} = #{value}

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS ( SELECT id, category_name, parent_id FROM kol_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} UNION ALL SELECT k.id, k.category_name, k.parent_id FROM kol_category k INNER JOIN cte ON k.parent_id = cte.id ) SELECT * FROM cte

SELECT DISTINCT parent_attr.id FROM kol_attribute parent_attr WHERE parent_attr.attribute_name_path IN ( SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(attr.attribute_name_path, '|', 1) AS parent_name FROM kol_attribute attr INNER JOIN kol_category_attribute_relation car ON attr.id = car.attribute_category_id WHERE car.category_id = #{categoryId}
)
